adapter_notes:
DATA ADAPTERS

ADX adapter (delayed, 15-min):
- Source priority: (1) production = licensed vendor feed (ICE/LSEG) with display+redistribution+non-pro attestation; (2) prototype = headless real-Chrome session against www.adx.ae that captures the gateway XHR or reads the server-rendered DOM board at /all-equities. Plain server curl/WebFetch is blocked (Cloudflare 403) — must use a real browser context.
- Gateway base https://apigateway.adx.ae. Every JSON call needs Authorization: Bearer minted by the app via www.adx.ae/api/bpm/get-cookie?getAllCookie=true (httpOnly cookie). Do NOT hardcode/exfiltrate the token; obtain it fresh per browser session.
- Envelope contract: parse {response, resultCode, resultMessage, errorMessages[]}. Treat resultCode!="S" (and HTTP 401 with errorMessages=["Unauthorized"]) as a hard failure → re-auth.
- Quote feed: /adx/marketwatch-delayed/1.1/securityBoard/marketwatch (full board, all equities, ~88 tickers). Universe: /adx/lookups/1.1/data/listed-companies. Sector tag: /adx/lookups/1.1/data/symbol-sector (cache, refresh weekly). Index: /adx/marketwatch/1.1/indexChartDay/FADGI (also FADX15). Status: /adx/marketwatch/1.1/trading-status.
- Query-string params for securityBoard and tradings/news/category were NOT captured (sanitizer redacted) — inspect in browser devtools before wiring paging/filters.
- Label all ADX/DFM quotes "15-min delayed" in the UI; never present as live.

DFM adapter (delayed, 15-min):
- Delayed feed gateway socket.io v1 at dfeed.dfm.ae (real-time = rfeed.dfm.ae, needs paid entitlement). Snapshot JSON via POST to https://marketwatch.dfm.ae/dapi/fetch (internal session-cookie AJAX — unstable, scraping likely breaches terms; prefer licensed vendor for production).
- Alias map required: ARMX->Aramex, MASQ->Mashreq. GFH dual-listed.
- Foreign-ownership enrichment (Permitted/Actual/Available since Feb 2019) from www.dfm.ae/the-exchange/statistics-reports/foreign-ownership — useful as a per-security data block.

Exchange-routing guardrail (bake into the symbol resolver):
- DFM-only (reject if placed on ADX): EMAAR, EMAARDEV, DEWA, EMIRATESNBD, DIB, DU/EITC, SALIK, PARKIN, EMPOWER, MASQ/Mashreq, AMLAK, TALABAT, TECOM, DTC, AIRARABIA, ARMX/Aramex.
- AMR (Americana) IS ADX (dual ADX+Tadawul 6015). DP World = Nasdaq Dubai (not main board).
- Stale-ticker filter: MULTIPLY is dead -> map to 2POINTZERO (Two Point Zero Group). FERTIGLOBE -> FERTIGLB. Use ADNOCDIST/ADNOCDRILL/ADNOCLS/ADNOCGAS truncated forms.
- "128 listed securities" includes ETFs/funds/sukuk/foreign lines; filter to ordinary equities (~88 on board) for the equities universe.

World Bank Pink Sheet adapter:
- Never hardcode the doc-id folder. Step 1: GET worldbank.org/en/research/commodity-markets, regex the href ending in related/CMO-Historical-Data-Monthly.xlsx. Step 2: download that xlsx (anonymous HTTPS, no key). Parse sheets: Monthly Prices (series), Monthly Indices (2010=100 aggregates), Index Weights, Description (confirm base year + exact column headers; STEEL/REBAR/DAIRY codes vary by vintage). Refresh monthly (~2nd of month). PDF filename pattern CMO-Pink-Sheet-<Month>-<Year>.pdf.
- Macro series only via Indicators API v2 (api.worldbank.org/v2/...?format=json — default is XML, MUST append format=json). Pink Sheet prices are NOT in the Indicators API.

GDELT adapter:
- Base https://api.gdeltproject.org/api/v2/doc/doc, format=json. artlist fields: url,url_mobile,title,seendate,socialimage,domain,language,sourcecountry. Use timelinevol/timelinetone for per-sector volume+sentiment, tonechart for distribution.
- Hard rate-limit handling: max 1 req / 5s per IP; on HTTP 429 (plaintext body) back off exponentially. Lookback capped ~3 months (current-news only, not history backfill).
- Per-sector news factor via theme: filters (ECON_INTEREST_RATE, ECON_OILPRICE, TOURISM, AGRICULTURE, trade/maritime, NATURAL_DISASTER). GEO 2.0 GeoJSON unverified (404 from probe IP) — treat as optional/doc-only.

AI ADAPTER (analyze() dispatched by env AI_PROVIDER, default "claude"):
- claude backend (free, default): subprocess `claude` 2.1.177 in print mode with structured-envelope output format + the native JSON-Schema flag + append-form analyst system prompt + model sonnet + tools disabled + no session persistence + spend cap. Parse stdout JSON once, then parse the "result" field again (it is a serialized string). FAIL on the is_error field, NOT the exit code (exit code is 0 even on auth failure). Never set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (would bill paid API). Headless auth via CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN (from claude setup-token) in the launchd plist.
- openai backend (paid fallback): imported only when AI_PROVIDER=openai; reads OPENAI_API_KEY at call time, fails loud if missing. Uses Structured Outputs response_format.
- stub backend: deterministic offline object for CI.
- One shared schemas module authored to OpenAI strict rules (additionalProperties:false on every object, every key in required, optionals as ["type","null"] unions) -> serves claude + openai + stub. Define one schema per job: classify, summarize, score, analyze.
- Re-validate the returned object against the schema before writing to the ledger. Cache by hash(task_name + schema_version + input_text) in the GitHub-repo DB so re-runs are free (Max sub is not unlimited). For Arabic filings, state output language explicitly in the system prompt.
- If CLI is downgraded below 2.1.177, fall back to prompt-instructed structured output + validation pass + retry loop.

COMPLIANCE GUARDRAILS (enforce in the AI output layer):
- Output framing must be descriptive/analytical/educational, NOT personalized buy/sell/hold. Block at generation time: named buy/sell/hold calls, price targets, "will go up"/"will moon" statements on specific tickers, and any personalization to the user's circumstances.
- Attach persistent disclaimers: publish date/time, "past performance is not indicative of future results", high-risk flags, conflict-of-interest note, and "obtain advice from an SCA-licensed entity before investing."
- If a flow ever crosses into a recommendation for UAE users, route through an SCA-registered finfluencer / licensed entity. This posture is risk-mitigation, NOT a confirmed statutory exemption — gate public launch on UAE counsel sign-off of Resolution 10/R.M 2025.
open_questions: ADX/DFM market-data redistribution: exact reuse clause in ADX Terms of Use was Cloudflare-blocked and never read verbatim. Confirm in a browser whether 15-min-delayed gateway/DOM data can be redistributed in a third-party app, or whether a licensed vendor (ICE/LSEG) agreement is mandatory before launch.

SCA Resolution 10/R.M 2025: the verbatim article text (esp. any exemption for educational/general-information content) was never extracted — only corroborated via law-firm summaries. Pull the official Arabic/English PDF from sca.gov.ae/regulations and get UAE securities counsel to confirm the 'research-support, not advice' posture actually keeps the app out of the finfluencer-registration requirement.
Whether DFSA/ADGM free-zone rules also apply depends on where the app entity is domiciled and whom it markets to — not covered by this onshore-only research.

Exact query-string parameters for the ADX securityBoard/marketwatch and tradings/news/category endpoints (paging, filters) were redacted by the research tooling — capture them in browser devtools before building list pagination.

World Bank Pink Sheet exact column header codes for STEEL/REBAR and DAIRY series vary by xlsx vintage; confirm the current headers and the index base year (Description sheet) when wiring the commodity factors.

GDELT GEO 2.0 GeoJSON endpoint (/api/v2/geo/geo) returned 404 from the research IP while /doc/doc worked — verify whether GEO is usable from production infrastructure or whether to rely solely on DOC 2.0.

claude 2.1.177 auth failed in the research sandbox (base-URL override + keychain skip). Confirm in Khalid's own shell with `claude auth status` that the free schema-flag lane authenticates and returns total_cost_usd=0 before relying on it for unattended runs.

Several seed names are recent IPOs (Salik 2022, Parkin 2024, Borouge 2022, ADNOC Gas/Drilling/Logistics, Burjeel, PureHealth) with short price histories — factor betas will be unstable; decide whether to estimate empirically or keep the analytical sign-only exposure map until enough history accrues.

Ghitha/Agthia relationship: the seed lists Ghitha Holding under a placeholder symbol (AGTHIA_GHITHA) because the exact ADX ticker for Ghitha was not captured (board showed GHITHA). Confirm the canonical ticker is GHITHA and correct before ingest.

du is listed under DFM with symbol DU here, but the live captures referenced EITC/du on DFM without a confirmed board ticker string — verify the exact DFM symbol used in the feed (DU vs EITC) during the DFM adapter build.
